top_signals.title: US Goes All-In on Diesel Production Amid Growing Global Shortage
top_signals.summary: US refiners are ramping up diesel production to near-record levels, bucking seasonal trends as the Russia and Iran wars trigger a global supply crunch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Warsh Confuses Traders, Makes Them Guess Next Week’s Rate Move
top_signals.summary: The Kevin Warsh Fed is already putting its stamp on financial markets: Just days before the central bank’s next meeting, traders are still split on whether it’s going to raise interest rates or not.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Benchmark sees Hut 8 becoming a ‘power-first data center REIT,’ raises target another 18%
top_signals.summary: Benchmark’s new price target implies roughly 75% upside, with Hut 8 shares already up nearly 120% year to date.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU antitrust regulators clear Paramount-WBD merger as it faces challenge by U.S. states
$100M New Jersey deli fraudster James Patten sentenced to 21 months in prison
top_signals.summary: The notorious New Jersey deli fraud case led to losses of more than $5 million for victims that included two U.S. universities.
